name: Creme De Menthe Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Green creme de menthe liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Bottom Layer: In a saucepan combine 1/2 cup of the butter and 1/2 cup cocoa powder. Heat and stir until well blended. Remove from heat.
2. Add 1/2 cup powdered sugar, the egg, and vanilla. Stir in graham cracker crumbs. Mix well.
3. Press into an ungreased 9x13 inch pan.
4. Middle Layer: Melt 1/2 cup butter. In a bowl combine melted butter and creme de menthe. Beat in remaining 3 cups powdered sugar until smooth. Spread over chocolate. Chill for 1 hour.
5. Top Layer: In a saucepan combine 1/4 cup butter and chocolate bits. Stir until melted. Spread over mint layer. Chill for 1 to 2 hours.
6. Cut into small squares. Store in the refrigerator. Makes about 96 squares.
